Our Products

Certified, export-ready food ingredients manufactured in-house. Available in customised forms, grades, and packaging.

🥜 Cashew Kernels

Premium grades for every application

Sourced from the finest cashew belts and processed in our state-of-the-art facility, our cashew kernels are available in all internationally traded grades — whole, splits, and pieces.

Available Grades / Forms

W180W210W240W320W450SWSSWJHLWPSWPBBSPBroken

Applications

  • Snacking & retail
  • Confectionery & chocolate
  • Bakery & granola
  • Food service & catering
Full Product Details
🥜

Cashew Kernels

Whole Kernels
Splits & Pieces
Roasted (on request)
🧅 Dehydrated Onion

White & red varieties, all forms

Processed from fresh white and red onions in our dedicated dehydration plant. Consistent pungency, colour, and rehydration ratio — ideal for food manufacturers and spice blenders.

Available Grades / Forms

Flakes (3–5mm)Minced (1–3mm)Granules (0.5–1mm)Powder (40–80 mesh)

Applications

  • Soups & sauces
  • Seasoning blends
  • Ready meals
  • Snack coatings
Full Product Details
🧅

Dehydrated Onion

White Onion
Red Onion
Kibbled / Chopped
🧄 Dehydrated Garlic

High allicin, full range of forms

Made from fresh, mature garlic bulbs using low-temperature dehydration to preserve allicin content, flavour compounds, and natural colour. Trusted by spice companies worldwide.

Available Grades / Forms

Flakes (3–5mm)Granules (0.5–1mm)Minced (1–3mm)Powder (40–80 mesh)

Applications

  • Seasoning blends
  • Marinades & rubs
  • Instant noodles
  • Processed meats
Full Product Details
🧄

Dehydrated Garlic

Natural Garlic
Roasted Garlic (on request)
🫚 Dehydrated Ginger

Natural gingerol, maximum potency

Fresh ginger roots carefully cleaned, peeled, and dehydrated at controlled temperatures to retain natural gingerol, shogaols, and essential oils. Available in slices, flakes, granules, and powder.

Available Grades / Forms

Slices (3–5mm)Flakes (2–4mm)Granules (0.5–1mm)Powder (40–80 mesh)

Applications

  • Beverages & teas
  • Bakery & confectionery
  • Health supplements
  • Curry pastes & sauces
Full Product Details
🫚

Dehydrated Ginger

Natural
Steam-treated (on request)

Need Customised Specifications?

We work with buyers to tailor moisture levels, granulation sizes, packaging formats, and certifications to your exact requirements.

India-based manufacturer and exporter of premium cashew kernels, dehydrated onion, garlic, and ginger. Serving worldwide export markets with certified, quality-focused food ingredients.
